description: Grooved two-high roll pass, longitudinal cutaway: stocky billet (V pipe remnant, inclusion specks, dotted core segregation) squeezed into a slimmer round bar with a diameter step at the bite; inset bite section proves the ROUND pass. Reveals: counter-rotation + flow arrows at the bite; pipe thread and inclusion stringers draw axially along the exiting bar; dotted segregated core fades in; line legend; dashed centerline with PARALLEL TO THE AXIS tag.
